ast.name: appendText

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Select the AI model to use when planning complex tasks.
ast.target: 选择用于规划复杂任务的 AI 模型。

ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: 此浏览器缺少 `buffer` v5.x 所需的类型化数组 (Uint8Array) 支持。如果需要旧版浏览器支持，请使用 `buffer` v4.x。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Extra content at the end of the document

ast.target: 解析行失败，从 0 开始！

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unknown state reached while processing groups of lines

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:
ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the AI model to use.
ast.target: 选择要使用的 AI 模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the AI model to use for quick actions. A fast, lightweight model is recommended.
ast.target: 选择用于快速操作的 AI 模型。建议使用快速、轻量级的模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 在此处输入你的 API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the maximum number of results provided to the AI when it searches through files in your vault. Higher values provide more context but increase search time.
ast.target: 设置 AI 在搜索保险库中的文件时提供的最大结果数。更高的值提供更多上下文，但会增加搜索时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the character limit of search previews provided to the AI when it searches through files in your vault. Higher values provide more context per result.
ast.target: 设置 AI 在搜索保险库中的文件时提供的搜索预览字符限制。更高的值为每个结果提供更多上下文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow the AI to read content from pages open in the Obsidian web viewer (Obsidian core plugin). This is not the same as general web access which can be toggled using the chat controls.
ast.target: 允许 AI 读取在 Obsidian 网页查看器（Obsidian 核心插件）中打开的页面内容。这与可通过聊天控件切换的通用网络访问不同。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show quick actions in the right-click editor context menu.
ast.target: 在右键编辑器上下文菜单中显示快速操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a quick actions button in the editor toolbar (mobile friendly).
ast.target: 在编辑器工具栏中显示快速操作按钮（适合移动端）。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 API 密钥

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 在插件指南中了解更多

ast.name: warn
ast.source: using deprecated parameters for `initSync()`; pass a single object instead
ast.target: `initSync()` 使用了已弃用的参数；请改为传递单个对象

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You are running on Apple Silicon using an x64 Node.js installation. PDF generation will be significantly faster (avoiding Rosetta translation) if you switch to a native arm64 Node.js version.
ast.target: 您正在使用 x64 版本的 Node.js 运行于 Apple Silicon 上。如果切换到原生 arm64 版本的 Node.js，PDF 生成速度将显著提升（避免 Rosetta 转译）。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Browser-based PDF generation triggered. For automated 'Save as PDF' without user interaction, we recommend using 'html2pdf.js' as a custom generator hook.
ast.target: 已触发基于浏览器的 PDF 生成。要实现无需用户交互的自动化“另存为 PDF”，我们建议使用 'html2pdf.js' 作为自定义生成器钩子。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Smart selection is now enabled by default with CSS. No need to call this method anymore.
ast.target: 智能选择现在默认通过 CSS 启用。不再需要调用此方法。

ast.source:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%cReading a derived belonging to a now-destroyed effect may result in stale values
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert
ast.target: %c[svelte] derived_inert\n%c读取属于已销毁效果的派生值可能导致过时的值\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert

ast.name: warn

https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount

https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not find text nodes for range deletion
ast.target: 找不到用于范围删除的文本节点

ast.name: content
ast.source:
#### Using references

Quickly provide context to the AI:

- **@filename** - Reference specific files
- **#tag** - Reference all notes with a tag
- **/folder** - Reference entire directories

The autocomplete dropdown supports keyboard navigation.
ast.target:
#### 使用引用

快速为 AI 提供上下文：

- **@文件名** - 引用特定文件
- **#标签** - 引用所有带有该标签的笔记
- **/文件夹** - 引用整个目录

自动完成下拉菜单支持键盘导航。

ast.name: content
ast.source: A text response is required. Please provide your response.
ast.target: 需要文本回复。请提供您的回复。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You must singal step completion as either successful or unsuccessful
ast.target: 您必须将步骤完成状态标记为成功或失败

ast.name: content
ast.source: The workflow has completed. Provide a concise summary for the user that covers: (1) what was originally planned, (2) what was actually accomplished, and (3) any notable outcomes or issues. Reference the execution agent outputs and step results for context.
ast.target: 工作流已完成。请为用户提供一个简洁的总结，涵盖：(1) 最初计划的内容，(2) 实际完成的内容，以及 (3) 任何值得注意的结果或问题。请参考执行代理的输出和步骤结果以获取上下文。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You must signal a decision: continue with the next step, request a replan, or abort execution.
ast.target: 您必须做出决定：继续下一步、请求重新规划或中止执行。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Planning mode is enabled, you should request planned execution when appropriate or if you do not have the required tools to complete the request
ast.target: 规划模式已启用，您应在适当时机请求计划执行，或者如果您没有完成请求所需的工具，也应请求计划执行

ast.name: description
ast.target: 纯 JavaScript 多语言 OCR

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search patterns for vault files (searches both names and content). Supports plain text (case-insensitive) or regex literals with /pattern/flags format. Examples: "meeting notes", /\bproject\b/i, /(k8s|kubernetes)/i. Returns files matching ANY term (OR logic).
ast.target: 搜索保险库文件的模式（同时搜索名称和内容）。支持纯文本（不区分大小写）或带有 /pattern/flags 格式的正则表达式字面量。示例：“会议笔记”、/\\bproject\\b/i、/(k8s|kubernetes)/i。返回匹配任意术语（OR 逻辑）的文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of full paths to files within the vault. Can contain a single file path ['folder/note.md'] or multiple paths ['folder/note1.md', 'folder/note2.pdf']. Each path must be exact and point to an existing file.
ast.target: 保险库内文件的完整路径数组。可以包含单个文件路径 ['folder/note.md'] 或多个路径 ['folder/note1.md', 'folder/note2.pdf']。每个路径必须精确并指向现有文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining why you're reading these file(s). Examples: 'Reading your daily note to check tasks' (single file) or 'Reading your project notes to compile a summary' (multiple files)
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释您正在读取这些文件的原因。示例：“读取您的每日笔记以检查任务”（单个文件）或“读取您的项目笔记以汇编摘要”（多个文件）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full path to the file within the vault. Example: 'folder/note.md'
ast.target: 保险库内文件的完整路径。示例：'folder/note.md'

ast.name: description
ast.source: The complete content to write to the file. This will replace any existing content.
ast.target: 要写入文件的完整内容。这将替换任何现有内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining what you're writing and why. Example: 'Creating your daily note for today'
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释您正在写入的内容及原因。示例：“为您创建今天的每日笔记”

ast.name: description
ast.source: An array of file paths to be deleted (e.g., ['folder/note.md', 'note2.md', 'folder/subfolder']). Must be an exact match to existing files or folders.
ast.target: 要删除的文件路径数组（例如 ['folder/note.md', 'note2.md', 'folder/subfolder']）。必须与现有文件或文件夹精确匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Safety flag that must be explicitly set to true to confirm the deletion is intentional. This prevents accidental deletions.
ast.target: 安全标志，必须显式设置为 true 以确认删除是有意的。这可以防止意外删除。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of current file paths to move. Each path must be exact and point to an existing file within the vault. Example: ['folder/note.md'] for single file or ['folder1/note1.md', 'folder2/note2.md'] for multiple files.
ast.target: 要移动的当前文件路径数组。每个路径必须精确并指向保险库内的现有文件。示例：单个文件 ['folder/note.md'] 或多个文件 ['folder1/note1.md', 'folder2/note2.md']。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining why these files are being moved. Examples: 'Moving your daily notes to the archive folder' (organizing), 'Renaming project files to match new naming convention' (renaming), or 'Consolidating research notes into one location' (reorganizing).
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释移动这些文件的原因。示例：“将您的每日笔记移动到归档文件夹”（整理）、“重命名项目文件以匹配新命名规范”（重命名）或“将研究笔记整合到一个位置”（重新组织）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The directory path to list. Use "/" for the vault root. Specify a subdirectory path to list contents of that specific folder (e.g., 'Projects/2024' or 'Daily Notes'). Path should be relative to vault root.
ast.target: 要列出的目录路径。使用“/”表示保险库根目录。指定子目录路径以列出该特定文件夹的内容（例如 'Projects/2024' 或 'Daily Notes'）。路径应相对于保险库根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When true, recursively lists all files and subdirectories in a tree structure. When false, only lists immediate children of the specified directory.
ast.target: 为 true 时，以树状结构递归列出所有文件和子目录。为 false 时，仅列出指定目录的直接子项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining what directory is being listed. Example: 'Browsing vault structure' or 'Listing files in Daily Notes folder'
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释正在列出的目录。示例：“浏览保险库结构”或“列出 Daily Notes 文件夹中的文件”

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full path to the file within the vault (e.g., 'folder/note.md')
ast.target: 保险库内文件的完整路径（例如 'folder/note.md'）

ast.name: description
ast.source: An array of new content strings that will replace the corresponding old content at the same index. Each entry must have a matching entry in oldContent. Ensure proper indentation and formatting matches the surrounding code.
ast.target: 新内容字符串数组，将替换相同索引处对应的旧内容。每个条目必须在 oldContent 中有匹配的条目。确保适当的缩进和格式与周围代码匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining what you're writing and why (e.g., 'Updating project plan with new tasks')
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释您正在写入的内容及原因（例如，“用新任务更新项目计划”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Safety flag that must be explicitly set to true to confirm the step completion is intentional. This prevents accidental completions.
ast.target: 安全标志，必须显式设置为 true 以确认步骤完成是有意的。这可以防止意外完成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ordered array of execution steps. Each step represents an actionable task that moves toward the goal.
ast.target: 有序的执行步骤数组。每个步骤代表一个可操作的任务，推动目标实现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brief summary of what this step accomplishes (e.g., 'Search for ML notes', 'Create index file'). This is user-facing and should be very concise.
ast.target: 此步骤完成内容的简要摘要（例如，“搜索 ML 笔记”、“创建索引文件”）。这是面向用户的，应非常简洁。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional supporting context for this step. May include extracts from vault notes, relevant information gathered during planning, or other contextual details that will help execute this step effectively.
ast.target: 此步骤的可选支持上下文。可能包括保险库笔记的摘录、规划期间收集的相关信息或其他有助于有效执行此步骤的上下文细节。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Explain why cancellation is being chosen, including what went wrong, what conditions prevented continuation, or why the task cannot proceed as planned.
ast.target: 解释选择取消的原因，包括出了什么问题、阻止继续的条件，或为什么任务无法按计划进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining what action you are taking. Examples: 'Asking the users preference for note naming', 'Querying the user about desired vault structure'
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释您正在采取的操作。示例：“询问用户对笔记命名的偏好”、“向用户查询期望的保险库结构”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Safety flag that must be explicitly set to true to confirm the completion is intentional. This prevents accidental plan completions.
ast.target: 安全标志，必须显式设置为 true 以确认完成是有意的。这可以防止意外的计划完成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A summary of what was accomplished, any outputs produced, or what prevented completion.
ast.target: 已完成内容的摘要、产生的任何输出或阻止完成的原因。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A brief message displayed to the user indicating that a workflow is being executed on their behalf. Keep this concise and informative. Examples: 'Organizing your project notes by topic', 'Compiling your AI research into a summary document', 'Restructuring your vault's folder hierarchy'
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，表明正在代表他们执行工作流。保持简洁和信息丰富。示例：“按主题整理您的项目笔记”、“将您的 AI 研究汇编成摘要文档”、“重构您保险库的文件夹层次结构”

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining the update/revision. Example: 'Revising plan step to include requested updates' or 'Updating plan step to include extra notes'
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释更新/修订。示例：“修订计划步骤以包含请求的更新”或“更新计划步骤以包含额外笔记”

ast.name: description
ast.source: All steps that still need to execute, starting from the current position. Include a revised version of the current step as the first entry if it needs to be redone; omit it if it completed successfully.
ast.target: 所有仍需执行的步骤，从当前位置开始。如果当前步骤需要重做，请包含其修订版本作为第一个条目；如果成功完成，则省略它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brief summary of what this step accomplishes (e.g., 'Search for ML notes', 'Create index file'). This is user-facing and should be concise.
ast.target: 此步骤完成内容的简要摘要（例如，“搜索 ML 笔记”、“创建索引文件”）。这是面向用户的，应简洁。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining why the plan is being revised. Example: 'Revising plan to include updating newly found notes in 'Recipes' folder'
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释修订计划的原因。示例：“修订计划以包含更新在 'Recipes' 文件夹中新发现的笔记”

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining why the step is being skipped. Example: 'Skipping step as requested by user' or 'Skipping non critical step'
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释跳过该步骤的原因。示例：“按用户请求跳过步骤”或“跳过非关键步骤”

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full path to the folder to create within the vault. Intermediate parent folders will be created automatically if they do not exist. Example: 'projects/2024/notes'
ast.target: 要在保险库内创建的文件夹的完整路径。如果中间父文件夹不存在，将自动创建。示例：'projects/2024/notes'

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining what folder you're creating and why. Example: 'Creating a new Projects folder to organise your notes'
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释您正在创建的文件夹及原因。示例：“创建一个新的 Projects 文件夹以整理您的笔记”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional. A partial URL or domain to identify which Web Viewer tab to read from, if multiple tabs are open. If omitted, the active or most recently opened Web Viewer tab will be used. Example: 'github.com'
ast.target: 可选。用于标识要读取的网页查看器标签页的部分 URL 或域名（如果打开了多个标签页）。如果省略，将使用活动或最近打开的网页查看器标签页。示例：'github.com'

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format in which to return the page content. Use 'text' for plain readable content (equivalent to document.body.innerText), or 'screenshot' for an image of the webpage. Prefer 'text' unless you need to inspect the page visually.
ast.target: 返回页面内容的格式。使用 'text' 获取纯文本可读内容（等同于 document.body.innerText），或使用 'screenshot' 获取网页图像。除非需要视觉检查页面，否则首选 'text'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining what you're reading and why. Example: 'Reading the open page to summarise its key points'
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释您正在读取的内容及原因。示例：“读取打开的页面以总结其要点”

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining what folder is being deleted and why. Example: 'Deleting the 2024 projects folder as it is no longer needed'
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释正在删除的文件夹及原因。示例：“删除 2024 项目文件夹，因为它不再需要”

ast.name: description
ast.source: The current path of the folder to move. Must be exact and point to an existing folder within the vault. Example: 'projects/old-name'
ast.target: 要移动的文件夹的当前路径。必须精确并指向保险库内的现有文件夹。示例：'projects/old-name'

ast.name: description
ast.source: The destination path for the folder (including the folder name). Supports renaming by providing a different folder name. Example: 'projects/new-name' or 'archive/projects/old-name'. Ensure the parent directory exists.
ast.target: 文件夹的目标路径（包括文件夹名称）。通过提供不同的文件夹名称支持重命名。示例：'projects/new-name' 或 'archive/projects/old-name'。确保父目录存在。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A short message to be displayed to the user explaining why this folder is being moved. Examples: 'Moving your projects folder to the archive' (archiving), 'Renaming folder to match new naming convention' (renaming), or 'Reorganising your vault structure' (reorganizing).
ast.target: 向用户显示的简短消息，解释移动此文件夹的原因。示例：“将您的项目文件夹移动到归档”（归档）、“重命名文件夹以匹配新命名规范”（重命名）或“重新组织您的保险库结构”（重新组织）。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Use this function when you need to search the web for current
                          information, recent events, news, or facts that may have changed.
                          After calling this, you will be able to perform web searches.
ast.target: 当您需要搜索网络以获取当前信息、近期事件、新闻或可能已更改的事实时，请使用此功能。调用此功能后，您将能够执行网络搜索。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use this function when you need to search the web for current information, recent events, news, or facts that may have changed.
ast.target: 当您需要搜索网络以获取当前信息、近期事件、新闻或可能已更改的事实时，请使用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search query to look up on the web.
ast.target: 要在网络上查找的搜索查询。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Confirmation was false, no action taken
ast.target: 确认为 false，未采取任何操作

ast.name: error
ast.source: Source paths array length does not equal destination paths array length
ast.target: 源路径数组长度不等于目标路径数组长度

ast.name: error
ast.source: No open web view was found. Ask the user to open a page in the web viewer and try again.
ast.target: 未找到打开的网页视图。请让用户在网页查看器中打开一个页面，然后重试。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid tool call - this is an execution tool and cannot be called during the planning phase.
ast.target: 无效的工具调用 - 这是一个执行工具，不能在规划阶段调用。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The planned workflow has failed, however steps may have been completed. Consult with the user on how to continue.
ast.target: 规划的工作流已失败，但某些步骤可能已完成。请与用户协商如何继续。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid tool call - this is not an orchestration tool and cannot be called during the orchestration phase.
